content: Migrate note-sync from JSON-on-disk to SQLite. The JSON storage corrupts when two clients sync at the same time.

message.content: Migrate note-sync from JSON-on-disk to SQLite. The JSON storage corrupts when two clients sync at the same time.

content.text: Walked the storage layer - it's a single load-modify-write of the whole JSON file. Two concurrent syncs race the write. Sketching a SQLite-backed StorageBackend trait so the migration is isolated to one module.

message.content: Use WAL mode and one connection per task.

content.text: WAL set in the migration init. Connection-per-task is wired through the existing thread pool. Tests for the concurrent-sync case pass on five parallel writers.
